override_value.description: The overriding quota limit value. Can be any nonnegative integer, or -1 (unlimited quota).

service.description: The service that the metrics belong to, e.g. `compute.googleapis.com`.

metric.description: The metric that should be limited, e.g. `compute.googleapis.com/cpus`.

limit.description: The limit on the metric, e.g. `/project/region`. ~> Make sure that `limit` is in a format that doesn't start with `1/` or contain curly braces. E.g. use `/project/user` instead of `1/{project}/{user}`.

dimensions.description: If this map is nonempty, then this override applies only to specific values for dimensions defined in the limit unit.

force.description: If the new quota would decrease the existing quota by more than 10%, the request is rejected. If `force` is `true`, that safety check is ignored.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
